title: Indexed Arrays
description: Work with arrays that use numeric keys.

slides.title: Numeric Keys
slides.content:
# Indexed Arrays

In an indexed array, each element is automatically assigned a numeric key (index) starting from 0.

```php
$cars = ["Toyota", "Honda", "Ford"];
// Keys: 0 => "Toyota", 1 => "Honda", 2 => "Ford"
```

You can access elements by their index using square brackets:

```php
echo $cars[0]; // Toyota
echo $cars[2]; // Ford
```

slides.title: Accessing and Modifying

quizData.question: What is the index of the first element in an indexed array?
quizData.explanation: Indexed arrays start at index 0 by default.
